name: fever-bot
description: Bot para o discord e estudos de programação

scripts.start: node dist/deploy-commands.js && node dist/deploy-interaction.js && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev: node src/deploy-commands.js && node src/deploy-interaction.js && nodemon --ignore coverage --inspect=0.0.0.0:9229 src/index.js

author: Felipe Seabra
